top_patterns.description: Open with a straightforward statement or greeting, then add a personal or emotional note.
example_quotes: Happy 4th from our family to yours.
Love this @tomsnewyork Remember the Earth is not given to us by our fathers, but borrowed from our children!!! #earthday

top_patterns.description: Announces an achievement, event, or milestone with gratitude or pride.
example_quotes: Today we celebrate a decade of TOMS. What a journey.
Deeply honored to be on the cover of @incmagazine.

top_patterns.pattern_name: Call to action or social cause
top_patterns.description: Encourages participation or highlights a cause, often with hashtags.
example_quotes: Stop trying to skip the struggle. The climb is always worth the view #tetons #grateful
Kick off your shoes with us. For every #withoutshoes photo, we're giving a pair of shoes to a child in need.

top_patterns.description: Expresses thanks or appreciation for people, experiences, or blessings.
top_patterns.structure_template: Thanks to [person/group], I am grateful for [reason]
example_quotes: Thanks to my dear friend @charlizeafrica for all the incredible work you do!
I have had many blessings in my life but being a father the past 18 months is only second to being the son of my dad.
Our journey started 7 years ago when fate brought us together in rural Ethiopia and now @wubetu_shimelash is a high school graduate and on his way to #wakeforestuniversity
I did it again. @winter_stone thanks for the new ink.
Thx @miguelsacramentophoto for this awesome shot from indo. Was a great trip and can't wait to do it again
Good morning 👍
Started my #withoutshoes day for @toms in the water and my feet were cold!!!
Kick off your shoes with us. For every #withoutshoes photo, we're giving a pair of shoes to a child in need.

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: mostly short, punchy sentences, often 8-12 words
language_habits.line_break_style: mostly continuous, minimal line breaks, occasional paragraph separation for emphasis

example_quotes: I have had many blessings in my life but being a father the past 18 months is only second to being the son of my dad.
Thanks to my dear friend @charlizeafrica for all the incredible work you do!
Deeply honored to be on the cover of @incmagazine.
Thanks to everyone for making our final decision a tough one.
Join us #withoutshoes and help children in need.
Start my #withoutshoes day for @toms in the water.

anti_patterns: Overly promotional language without personal touch
Vague statements without emotional or personal context
Generic greetings like 'Good morning' without follow-up
Lack of direct engagement or questions
Repetitive phrases that do not add new meaning

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, grateful, and action-oriented tone with short, punchy sentences.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more direct calls to action and community engagement, less formal.
